name: pdf-toolkit-mcp
description: 18 PDF operations (merge, split, compress, OCR, convert, watermark, protect, and more) exposed as MCP tools via the iLoveAPI REST service.
long_description: Unofficial MCP server that wraps the iLoveAPI REST platform so agents (Claude Desktop, Claude Code, and any MCP-compatible client) can merge, split, compress, convert, OCR, watermark, rotate, protect, unlock, repair, extract pages from, and add page numbers to PDFs with a single structured tool call. Ships with a companion `pdf-workflow` skill describing five canonical multi-step recipes. Requires an iLoveAPI project key pair from https://developer.ilovepdf.com. Not affiliated with iLovePDF SL.

ilove_public_key.title: iLoveAPI Project Public Key
ilove_public_key.description: Project Public Key from https://developer.ilovepdf.com (starts with `project_public_`).

ilove_secret_key.title: iLoveAPI Project Secret Key
ilove_secret_key.description: Project Secret Key from https://developer.ilovepdf.com. Used locally to sign short-lived JWTs; never sent anywhere except iLoveAPI.

sandbox_root.title: Sandbox root (optional)
sandbox_root.description: If set, all input and output paths must live inside this directory. Leave blank to allow any path the process can read and write.

tools.name: merge_pdf
tools.description: Merge two or more PDFs into a single PDF.

tools.name: split_pdf
tools.description: Split a PDF into ranges or fixed-size chunks.

tools.name: compress_pdf
tools.description: Compress a PDF with low/recommended/extreme profiles.

tools.name: pdf_to_word
tools.description: Convert a PDF to an editable .docx document.

tools.name: pdf_to_excel
tools.description: Convert a PDF's tables to an .xlsx workbook.

tools.name: pdf_to_powerpoint
tools.description: Convert a PDF to a .pptx presentation.

tools.name: pdf_to_jpg
tools.description: Rasterize a PDF's pages into JPG images.

tools.name: html_to_pdf
tools.description: Render an HTML URL or fragment as a PDF.

tools.name: image_to_pdf
tools.description: Bundle one or more images into a single PDF.

tools.name: rotate_pdf
tools.description: Rotate all or selected pages by 90/180/270 degrees.

tools.name: add_page_numbers
tools.description: Stamp page numbers onto an existing PDF.

tools.name: add_watermark
tools.description: Apply a text or image watermark to a PDF.

tools.name: unlock_pdf
tools.description: Remove a known owner password from a PDF.

tools.name: protect_pdf
tools.description: Encrypt a PDF with a user password.

tools.name: repair_pdf
tools.description: Attempt to repair a corrupted PDF.

tools.name: ocr_pdf
tools.description: Run OCR over a scanned PDF to make it searchable.

tools.name: extract_pdf_pages
tools.description: Extract a subset of pages into a new PDF.
